skipped_files: tests/pipeline-templates.test.js (known hang — PTY process never closes)
tests/terminal.test.js (known hang — PTY process never closes)

performance.note: Local CLI tool — no HTTP performance SLA applies. Full suite completes in ~32s.

owasp_checks.check: Shell injection via comment.text in resolver prompt
owasp_checks.notes: Resolver prompt is written to a file and passed via stdin redirect (< promptFilePath). Comment text never reaches shell command string directly.

owasp_checks.check: Path traversal via commentId in resolverDonePath
owasp_checks.notes: commentId is generated by crypto.randomUUID() — UUID format prevents path traversal. No user-supplied commentId is accepted by the createComment endpoint.

owasp_checks.check: targetAgent field injection into shell command
owasp_checks.notes: targetAgent is validated (max 100 chars, non-empty, type=question only) before reaching pipelineManager. The agent is resolved via resolveAgent() which reads agent .md files by filename — not shell-executed directly.

owasp_checks.check: Prompt injection via comment.text reaching resolver agent
owasp_checks.notes: Comment text is embedded verbatim in resolver prompt. A malicious comment could attempt to redirect the resolver agent. Mitigated by: (a) agents run with --permission-mode bypassPermissions which limits tool access, (b) resolver is a lightweight scoped agent with a single job.

owasp_checks.check: PIPELINE_NO_SPAWN=1 bypasses agent resolution in production
owasp_checks.notes: The env var is a test-only hook. If accidentally set in production, resolvers would succeed without calling kanban_answer_comment, leaving runs blocked. Recommend documenting in operational runbook.
See BUG-002. resolverPid is deleted from blockedReason before the timeout log reads it. PID is always undefined in timeout log.

test_cases.description: POST question + valid targetAgent → 201, persisted in response
test_cases.notes: comments.test.js: crea question con targetAgent válido → 201, targetAgent en respuesta

test_cases.description: POST note + targetAgent → 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
POST answer + targetAgent → 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
POST question + empty string targetAgent → 400
POST question + targetAgent over 100 chars → 400
POST question without targetAgent → 201 backward compat, needsHuman=false
PATCH needsHuman=true → 200, field persists
PATCH needsHuman=false → 200, resets
PATCH needsHuman='yes' (non-boolean) → 400
PATCH empty body still 400 backward compat
Valid targetAgent in stages → resolverActive=true, blockedReason.targetAgent set
Invalid targetAgent (not in stages) → needsHuman=true, resolverActive absent
Question without targetAgent → normal block, no resolverActive
PIPELINE_NO_SPAWN=1 — resolver exit 0 clears resolverActive after polling
test_cases.notes: pipeline-blocked.test.js R-4. Waits 2 full polling cycles (2s each) + margin.

test_cases.description: Anti-recursion guard: second question with targetAgent while resolverActive=true does not spawn second resolver
Resolver timeout → needsHuman=true set on comment
test_cases.notes: Not covered by automated tests. Requires PIPELINE_RESOLVER_TIMEOUT_MS=100 + resolver that never writes done sentinel. Manual verification only.

test_cases.description: Multiple questions with targetAgent: second gets resolver after first resolved
test_cases.notes: BUG-001: unblockRunByComment does not propagate targetAgent or call attemptCrossAgentResolution for subsequent questions. Test not present because feature is broken.

test_cases.description: T-010: server restart with live resolver PID → polling reattaches
test_cases.notes: init() code path exists but no automated test covers restart scenario for resolvers. Tasks.json T-010 acceptance criteria not fully covered.

test_cases.description: T-010: server restart with dead resolver PID → needsHuman=true, resolverActive cleared
test_cases.notes: init() code path exists but no automated test covers this restart scenario.

test_cases.description: MCP kanban_add_comment passes targetAgent through to REST API
test_cases.notes: mcp-comment-pipeline.test.js TC-027; kanban-client.js addComment() verified by grep

test_cases.description: MCP add_comment without targetAgent — backward compat
E2E: invalid targetAgent → run blocked, needsHuman=true verified on disk
test_cases.notes: mcp-comment-pipeline.test.js TC-033 verifies run blocked + blockedReason commentId, but does NOT assert needsHuman=true. Code path confirmed correct by R-2 assertion.

test_cases.description: Existing question-block-unblock flow unaffected by new fields
test_cases.notes: All TC-001 through TC-016 in mcp-comment-pipeline.test.js pass (26 tests)

test_cases.description: Note comment still doesn't block pipeline
PATCH resolved=true still unblocks run (plain question path)
OWASP A03: Shell injection via comment.text — static analysis
test_cases.notes: Prompt written to file, passed via stdin. Shell command uses shellEscape() on all dynamic args.

test_cases.description: OWASP A03: Path traversal via commentId in resolverDonePath — static analysis
test_cases.notes: commentId is crypto.randomUUID() — UUID format (8-4-4-4-12 hex) is path-safe.

test_cases.description: OWASP A07: targetAgent field size/content guarded at REST layer
test_cases.notes: Max 100 chars, non-empty, type=question only. All assertions pass.
